name: Collider

documentation:
## Collider

Defines collision shapes and performs basic intersection detection between registered objects

### Runtime Notes
- Attach this lambda to objects via Lambda Components.
- If Auto Apply is enabled, it runs every frame.
- If Auto Apply is disabled, call `lambdaInstance.apply(deltaTime)` from behavior/lambda code.

### Component Parameters
| Key | Label | Type | Default | Options |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `shape` | Shape | `string` | `box` | `box`, `sphere`, `capsule` |
| `sizeX` | Size X / Radius | `number` | `1` | - |
| `sizeY` | Size Y / Height | `number` | `1` | - |
| `sizeZ` | Size Z | `number` | `1` | - |
| `isTrigger` | Is Trigger | `boolean` | `false` | - |
